string.name: whats_new_content
string.translation_description: HTML content listing new features in this release, shown in the What's new dialog and appended to the Help screen. Please do not change the < and > markup.

resources.string:
Improved Image Gallery

The gallery has been redesigned with a grid layout and better links to info cards.

Auto leveling horizon in manual mode

Auto horizon levelling is now toggled with a double tap when in manual mode.

Deep Sky Objects

Black holes Cygnus X-1 and Sagittarius A* are now in the Sky Map catalogue.
